intelligence.title: Rebar Capital Raises $14M for HVAC AI Platform
intelligence.description: Toronto-based Rebar secured Series A to expand AI-powered building management systems for commercial HVAC. Direct competitor to portfolio companies in trades tech vertical.
intelligence.investors: Prudence, Zero Infinity Partners, Founder Collective
intelligence.implication: Validates HVAC AI market; potential partnership or acquisition target

intelligence.title: Alberta GPU Cloud Demand Surge
intelligence.description: University of Alberta and NAIT announcing joint AI research initiative requiring 500+ H100 equivalent compute capacity. Potential anchor tenant for natural gas-powered data center.

intelligence.title: Robotics Warehouse Automation Trend
intelligence.description: Canadian e-commerce fulfillment centers accelerating robotics adoption post-holiday season. 3 portfolio companies positioned for pilot deployments.
